topic: 2Y Treasury yield DGS2 current level and volatility
summary: DGS2 at 3.47% on Feb 5, 2026. Daily vol ~0.03-0.045. 5 trading days to resolution.
content: Latest FRED DGS2: 3.47% (Feb 5), down 10bp from 3.57% on Feb 4. Recent 30-day daily std: 0.0293. Full-period (8 month) daily std: 0.0452. Yield has been range-bound 3.41-3.61 over past few months. Monte Carlo (3 methods combined) from 3.47 over 5 trading days gives median ~3.465 with P10=3.36, P90=3.56.
